articles.title: Ripple Co-Founder Jed McCaleb Dumps Another 40 Million XRP
articles.description: Ripple co-founder Jed McCaleb dumped another 40 million XRP following the SEC’s lawsuit against Ripple, bringing his wallet total to 499 million XRP.
